key_findings: RM stick reading pattern, 32 sticks per block, ntiles_per_block, TensorAccessor, split_blocks_for_tilize
untilize helper, writer stick extraction, output CB sizing
rsqrt+sub+mul pipeline, epsilon CB, affine transform routing, FPU dest reuse, SFPU path

choice: Hybrid mode with 11 core CBs + 4 gamma/beta CBs
rationale: Tilize input, 7-phase normalize in tile domain, untilize output. Gamma/beta optional with ROW broadcast.
Row-wise reduction for mean and variance. WaitUpfrontNoPop for mean (tiles persist for sub), WaitAndPopPerTile for variance.

choice: USE HELPERS sub<COL>, square, mul<COL>, mul<ROW>, add<SCALAR>, add<ROW>
rationale: All binary ops covered by binary_op_helpers. COL broadcast for mean/rsqrt, ROW broadcast for gamma/beta, SCALAR for epsilon.

choice: 5 stages: data_pipeline, subtract_mean, square_centered, full_normalize, gamma_beta
rationale: H1: reader/writer first. H2: testable intermediates. H3: max 3 new phases per stage (stage 4 has exactly 3).
